description: Create and deploy a channel named 'LIS_ACK_Normalizer' that relays HL7 ADT messages from TCP port 6661 to a legacy system on localhost port 6662. The legacy system returns ACKs missing required text descriptions in MSA-3 (e.g., 'MSA|AA|ID|'). The channel must log every raw, unmodified response from the destination to /home/ga/ack_audit.log (one per line) and normalize the ACK returned to the source. If MSA-1 is 'AA' and MSA-3 is missing, append 'Processed Successfully' to the field; if MSA-1 is 'AE' or 'AR' and MSA-3 is missing, append 'Remote Error'. A sample ADT message is available at /home/ga/documents/sample_adt.hl7 and the legacy system is active on port 6662.
